title: Deercrow shuffles Scarecrow or Big Buck sacrifice back to deck

card.rawText: Summon Requirement: If summoned by sacrificing "Scarecrow" or "Big Buck", send 1 of them back to your deck, then shuffle. This card receives 2x effects from Common / Uncommon magic cards for Hit, Atk, Atk Dice Rolls, and SPD.

effect.value: Summon Requirement: If summoned by sacrificing "Scarecrow" or "Big Buck", send 1 of them back to your deck, then shuffle. This card receives 2x effects from Common / Uncommon magic cards for Hit, Atk, Atk Dice Rolls, and SPD.

plan.title: Deercrow shuffles Scarecrow or Big Buck sacrifice back to deck
plan.summary: Summon Deercrow with a named sacrifice available and verify the shuffle-back summon requirement route is represented.

notes: Read text first: Summon Requirement: If summoned by sacrificing "Scarecrow" or "Big Buck", send 1 of them back to your deck, then shuffle. This card receives 2x effects from Common / Uncommon magic cards for Hit, Atk, Atk Dice Rolls, and SPD.
Use a Scarecrow-named sacrifice to satisfy the text before checking the deck shuffle effect.

steps: Attempt to summon Deercrow using Scarecrow as the named sacrifice.
Verify the selected sacrifice can return to deck and shuffle.

expectedAssertions.label: Shuffle deck marker emitted for named sacrifice

manualVerification: Also verify the doubled Common/Uncommon magic modifier rule in a separate combat fixture.
riskNotes: Fixture is scoped to the deterministic headless route; red results should identify missing runtime support or assertion drift.

coverageSuggestion.notes: Summon Deercrow with a named sacrifice available and verify the shuffle-back summon requirement route is represented.

runnerNotes: Create a dev match from plan.setup, execute plan.steps, then verify plan.expectedAssertions.
The deterministic engine and card rules text remain source of truth.
